---
title: "Teaching"
---

## 2025–2026

### Institut Agro Dijon

| Course | Level |
|--------|-------|
| Introduction to Economics | Bachelor |
| Public Economics | Graduate |
| Advanced Statistics | Graduate |
| Spatial Statistics | Graduate |

Teaching materials are available on the **Heliantice** platform (Institut Agro Dijon).

### Université de Franche-Comté

| Course | Level |
|--------|-------|
| Spatial Data Statistics and Econometrics | Graduate |
